name: Mexican Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the self-rising cornmeal, eggs, milk, oil, chopped onion, salt, and chopped jalapenos.
2. Stir in the grated cheddar cheese, sugar, and creamed corn until well mixed.
3. Pour the batter into an iron skillet coated with cooking spray.
4. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for about 20-25 minutes, or until the bread is golden brown on top.
